person_name: Peregrinus Proteus, Cynic philosopher (d. ca. 165 CE)
person_name_full: Peregrinus Proteus, Cynic philosopher (d. ca. 165 CE)
notes: Cynic philosopher known for self-immolation at the Olympic Games around 165 CE.

docs.title: BOOK XXIX
docs.author: Ammianus Marcellinus
docs.excerpt: … Proteus, who having determined to quit the world, at the quinquennial games of Olympia, in the sight of all Greece, mounted a funeral pile which he had built himself, and was there burnt alive. 40.
